function.message: Processed the next inbox item and ran the six requested finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to all six files while preserving each original body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox task file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in touched lanes, used OCR+migration workflows and finance schema, preserved original bodies below frontmatter, and deleted inbox item after full completion per inbox workflow.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly listed six finance files for OCR workflow. Each listed file was read, then updated in place with required invoice/bill YAML frontmatter fields and line items extracted from visible note content, with full original body retained. After all six updates succeeded, the processed inbox file was deleted per 00_inbox and process-next-inbox-item rules.
